string.name: module_desc
string.value: DistributedHardWareCast Studio - 分布式硬件能力示范

string.name: permission_distributed_reason
string.value: 用于发现、绑定和同步分布式设备

string.name: permission_camera_reason
string.value: 用于本地和分布式相机预览与拍摄

string.name: permission_mic_reason
string.value: 用于本地和分布式麦克风录音

string.name: permission_dh_reason
string.value: 用于注册分布式相机授权监听并响应导播端的镜头共享请求

string.name: permission_dh_access_reason
string.value: 系统应用：访问分布式硬件框架，使能远端 Mic/Speaker

string.name: permission_dh_enable_reason
string.value: 系统应用：EnableSink 分布式音频外设

string.name: permission_gallery_write_reason
string.value: 用于将拍摄的照片和视频保存到系统相册

string.name: permission_gallery_read_reason
string.value: 用于读取已保存的媒体文件
